help.workflow.title: Help
help.workflow.subtitle: Workflow help for the standard sequence.
help.workflow.step2.title: Step 1: Scan the input frames
help.workflow.step2.lead: Open Input & Scan or Wizard step 1 and start with a clean intake check.
help.workflow.step2.bullet1: Choose one absolute input directory for OSC or a serial MONO queue with exactly one input directory per filter.
help.workflow.step2.bullet2: Run the scan and verify that the detected frame count is plausible and that no unexpected files are mixed into the dataset.
help.workflow.step2.bullet3: Verify the detected color mode, image size and, for OSC, the Bayer pattern. Confirm the color mode manually if the dataset is ambiguous.
help.workflow.step2.bullet4: If you process MONO data, review queue order, optional patterns and run labels per filter before starting.
help.workflow.step3.title: Step 2: Review calibration inputs
help.workflow.step3.lead: Bias, dark and flat are only needed if the light frames are not already calibrated.
help.workflow.step3.bullet1: Enable bias, dark and flat only for the components your dataset actually needs.
help.workflow.step3.bullet2: Depending on your setup, choose either a directory with raw calibration frames or a master calibration file directly.
help.workflow.step3.bullet3: Keep the switches disabled if the lights are already calibrated or if you intentionally calibrated outside the pipeline.
help.workflow.step3.bullet4: Use readable absolute paths and make sure the filter and exposure logic matches your light frames.
help.workflow.step4.title: Step 3: Adjust and validate parameters
help.workflow.step4.lead: Parameter Studio is the central place for presets, fine tuning and the final technical review.
help.workflow.step4.bullet1: Start from a matching preset or from the current configuration and adjust parameters section by section.
help.workflow.step4.bullet2: Use search and the Explain panel to quickly understand effect, value range and risk of a setting.
help.workflow.step4.bullet3: For difficult datasets, pay special attention to registration, runtime limits and the BGE/PCC parameters.
help.workflow.step4.bullet4: Always run validation before starting. Errors should block the run; warnings should only remain if you accept them deliberately.
help.workflow.step5.title: Step 4: Start a run
help.workflow.step5.lead: A run can be launched from Dashboard, Wizard or the dedicated start controls.
help.workflow.step5.bullet1: Set output folder and run name so the result directory can later be clearly mapped to the dataset.
help.workflow.step5.bullet2: Check guardrails and validation status before starting. A red state should be resolved before launch.
help.workflow.step5.bullet3: Start the run and then move to Run Monitor to track phases, logs, stats, artifacts and resume targets.
help.workflow.step6.title: Step 6: Review outputs and report
help.workflow.step6.lead: Once all phases are complete, the output directory contains the generated files, intermediate results and the optional report.
help.workflow.step6.bullet1: Typical top-level results are files such as stack*, solve*, bge* or pcc*. They represent the stacked result, plate-solve/WCS outputs, background correction and color calibration.
help.workflow.step6.bullet2: The outputs subfolder usually contains the actual image products of the pipeline. That is where you find the final or near-final FITS files for the key processing stages.
help.workflow.step6.bullet3: The artifacts subfolder contains diagnostics and side products such as logs, statistics, JSON summaries and, if you generate it, the HTML report. If you want a report, generate it after the run; it will then appear in the artifacts folder.
help.workflow.step6.bullet4: registered and similar subfolders may contain registered intermediates, debug outputs or derived intermediate products, depending on configuration. These files are mainly useful for analysis, comparison and troubleshooting.
help.workflow.step6.bullet5: If you only want to assess the final result, start with the final stack/solve/BGE/PCC files. If you want to understand why the result turned out good or bad, also work through artifacts, logs and the report.
ui.message.monitor_validation_required: Run blocked: validate the configuration in Parameter Studio.
ui.message.monitor_validation_failed: Run blocked: the latest configuration validation failed.
ui.message.resume_info_history_bge_requi: History resume note: the run uses its existing artifacts. Resuming from BGE only recomputes BGE if matching local-metrics and BGE-grid artifacts are present in the run. If they are missing, BGE is skipped.
page.dashboard.title: GUI 2 - Dashboard
page.dashboard.intro: Quick start, run readiness, and status of all core modules at a glance.
page.dashboard.heading: Project Dashboard
page.dashboard.sub: Quick start, run readiness, and status of all core modules at a glance.
page.dashboard.guided_steps: 1) Input / run target  2) Preset + parameters  3) Validate  4) Start batch
page.dashboard.footer: Dashboard: quick start, run readiness, and core module status.
page.input_scan.title: GUI 2 - Input & Scan
page.input_scan.intro: Input folders, scan configuration, and calibration paths.
page.input_scan.heading: Input & Scan
page.input_scan.sub: Configure input folders, start scans, confirm Bayer pattern, and set calibration paths.
page.input_scan.footer: Controls: input folders, Bayer pattern, calibration frames. Scan result appears after clicking 'Start scan'.
page.wizard.title: GUI 2 - Wizard
page.wizard.intro: Guided Run Wizard. Steps 1-3 are identical to Input & Scan (input, MONO queue, calibration).
page.wizard.footer: Controls: input folders, Bayer pattern, calibration frames. Scan result appears after clicking 'Start scan'.
page.run_monitor.title: GUI 2 - Run Monitor
page.run_monitor.intro: Phase progress, filter context, per-phase resume.
page.run_monitor.sub: Current run is loaded from app state; phase and status are synchronized live.
page.assumptions.title: GUI 2 - Assumptions
page.assumptions.intro: Pipeline assumptions: frame thresholds, pipeline profile, and reduced-mode rules. Production page for assumptions and rule context.
page.assumptions.sub: Pipeline profile and frame thresholds determine the mode: Full / Reduced / Emergency.
page.assumptions.footer: Assumptions control when the runner switches to reduced mode or emergency mode.
page.assumptions.mode_full_hint: All pipeline phases active including clustering and synthetic frames.
page.assumptions.mode_emergency_hint: Base stacking only, no metrics, no synthetic frames.
page.history.title: GUI 2 - History
page.history.heading: History
page.history.sub: History remains separate; operational tools are on dedicated pages: Astrometry and PCC.
page.history.footer: History + Tools covers history; Astrometry/PCC run as dedicated screens with extended setup.
page.astrometry.title: GUI 2 - Astrometry
page.astrometry.intro: ASTAP CLI + star catalog setup and plate solve (matching the existing GUI functionality incl. download/status).
page.astrometry.sub: ASTAP setup, SourceForge downloads, catalog status, and plate solve with WCS results.
page.astrometry.footer: Astrometry screen covers the C++ GUI features: CLI install, catalog download, solve, and save solved.
page.pcc.title: GUI 2 - PCC
page.pcc.intro: Photometric Color Calibration with Siril or online catalog sources, including chunk download and cancel like in the existing GUI.
page.pcc.sub: RGB + WCS input, catalog source (Siril/VizieR), download management, and result matrix.
page.pcc.footer: PCC screen covers the C++ GUI features: Siril chunk download/cancel, online sources, run, and save.
page.live_log.title: GUI 2 - Live Log
page.live_log.intro: Real-time log output of the running run with filter options.
page.live_log.sub: Real-time log output of the running run with filter options.
page.live_log.footer: Live Log: real-time output of all log messages with filtering by level (Info, Warning, Error).
page.parameter_studio.title: GUI 2 - Parameter Studio
page.parameter_studio.intro: Complete parameter editing with search, explain panel, scenario recommendations, and YAML diff.
page.parameter_studio.sub: All relevant parameters with short explanation, tooltips, scenario hints.
page.parameter_studio.explain.title: Explain
page.parameter_studio.explain.label: Label
page.parameter_studio.explain.details_fa: No extra detail available; use the short description, default, and range as the main guidance.
page.parameter_studio.explain.risk.depre: Deprecated: keep this field for backward compatibility only.
page.parameter_studio.explain.risk.out_o: Out-of-range values may cause validation errors or unstable behavior.
page.parameter_studio.explain.risk.none: No explicit risk hint in the sources.
page.parameter_studio.footer: Parameter Studio: every input with tooltip, short explanation, and scenario recommendation. Completeness is checked against parameter_katalog.md and the function matrix.
param.assumptions.exposure_time_toleranc: Allowed exposure mismatch within one sequence. Range: >= 0. Default: 8.
param.assumptions.frames_min.short_help: Minimum usable frame count for normal mode. Range: >= 1. Default: 30.
param.assumptions.frames_optimal.short_h: Informational target for best quality/stability. Range: >= 1. Default: 300.
param.assumptions.frames_reduced_thresho: Threshold for reduced mode decisions. Runtime uses frames_reduced_threshold directly in both profiles. Range: >= 1. Default: 200.
param.assumptions.pipeline_profile.short: Select profile label for methodology traceability (practical / strict). pipeline_profile is retained for compatibility and reporting, while the image-processing core runs with a unified runtime path. Allowed values: practical, strict. Default: strict.
param.assumptions.reduced_mode_cluster_r: Cluster range fallback when reduced mode still runs clustering. Default: [3, 10].
param.assumptions.reduced_mode_skip_clus: Skip expensive clustering in reduced mode. Default: true.
param.astrometry.astap_bin.label: ASTAP CLI
param.astrometry.astap_bin.short_help: Path to ASTAP binary (empty = system/default path). Default: .
param.astrometry.astap_data_dir.label: ASTAP Data Dir
param.astrometry.astap_data_dir.short_he: Path to ASTAP data directory (empty = default path). Default: /media/data/Astro/astap.
param.astrometry.enabled.label: Enabled
param.astrometry.search_radius.label: Search Radius
param.astrometry.search_radius.short_hel: Search radius in degrees (180 = blind solve). Range: >= 1, <= 360. Default: 183.
param.bge.autotune.alpha_flatness.label: Alpha Flatness
param.bge.autotune.beta_roughness.label: Beta Roughness
param.bge.autotune.enabled.label: Enabled
param.bge.autotune.max_evals.label: Max Evals
param.bge.autotune.strategy.label: Strategy
param.bge.autotune.strategy.short_help: Allowed values: conservative, extended. Default: conservative.
param.bge.fit.huber_delta.label: Huber Delta
param.bge.fit.huber_delta.short_help: Huber transition parameter (active when bge.fit.robust_loss=huber). Range: > 0. Default: 1.5.
param.bge.fit.irls_max_iterations.label: IRLS Max Iterations
param.bge.fit.irls_tolerance.label: IRLS Tolerance
param.bge.fit.method.label: Method
param.bge.fit.method.short_help: Allowed values: poly, spline, bicubic, rbf, modeled_mask_mesh. Default: rbf.
param.bge.fit.polynomial_order.label: Polynomial Order
param.bge.fit.rbf_epsilon.label: RBF Epsilon
param.bge.fit.rbf_lambda.label: RBF Lambda
param.bge.fit.rbf_mu_factor.label: RBF Mu Factor
param.bge.fit.rbf_phi.label: RBF Phi
param.bge.fit.rbf_phi.short_help: Allowed values: thinplate, multiquadric, gaussian. Default: multiquadric.
param.bge.fit.robust_loss.label: Robust Loss
param.bge.fit.robust_loss.short_help: Robust loss function used in BGE IRLS fitting. Allowed values: huber, tukey. Default: huber.
param.bge.grid.G_max_fraction.label: G Max Fraction
param.bge.grid.G_min_px.label: G Min PX
param.bge.grid.N_g.label: N G
param.bge.grid.insufficient_cell_strateg: Allowed values: discard, nearest, radius_expand. Default: radius_expand.
param.bge.mask.sat_dilate_px.label: Sat Dilate PX
param.bge.mask.star_dilate_px.label: Star Dilate PX
param.bge.min_tiles_per_cell.label: Min Tiles Per Cell
param.bge.min_valid_sample_fraction_for_: Min Valid Sample Fraction For Apply
Per-channel safety gate for BGE application. If valid_tile_samples / total_tile_samples is below this value, BGE is skipped for that channel. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.28.
param.bge.min_valid_samples_for_apply.sh: Absolute per-channel safety gate for BGE application. If valid robust tile samples are fewer than this value, BGE is skipped for that channel. Range: >= 0. Default: 96.
param.bge.sample_quantile.label: Sample Quantile
param.calibration.bias_dir.short_help: Input directories for calibration stacks. Default: .
param.calibration.bias_master.label: Bias Master
param.calibration.bias_master.short_help: Paths to precomputed master calibration files. Default: .
param.calibration.bias_use_master.label: Bias Use Master
param.calibration.bias_use_master.short_: Use prebuilt master calibration files instead of stacking directories. Default: false.
param.calibration.dark_auto_select.label: Dark Auto Select
param.calibration.dark_auto_select.short: Auto-select matching darks by exposure (and optionally temperature). Default: true.
param.calibration.dark_master.label: Dark Master
param.calibration.dark_master.short_help: Paths to precomputed master calibration files. Default: .
param.calibration.dark_use_master.label: Dark Use Master
param.calibration.dark_use_master.short_: Use prebuilt master calibration files instead of stacking directories. Default: false.
param.calibration.darks_dir.short_help: Input directories for calibration stacks. Default: .
param.calibration.flat_master.label: Flat Master
param.calibration.flat_master.short_help: Paths to precomputed master calibration files. Default: .
param.calibration.flat_use_master.label: Flat Use Master
param.calibration.flat_use_master.short_: Use prebuilt master calibration files instead of stacking directories. Default: false.
param.calibration.flats_dir.short_help: Input directories for calibration stacks. Default: .
param.calibration.pattern.label: Pattern
param.calibration.use_bias.short_help: Enable per-frame-type calibration stages. Default: false.
param.calibration.use_dark.short_help: Enable per-frame-type calibration stages. Default: false.
param.calibration.use_flat.short_help: Enable per-frame-type calibration stages. Default: false.
param.chroma_denoise.apply_stage.label: Apply Stage
param.chroma_denoise.apply_stage.short_h: Allowed values: pre_stack_tiles, post_stack_linear. Default: post_stack_linear.
param.chroma_denoise.blend.amount.label: Amount
param.chroma_denoise.blend.mode.label: Mode
param.chroma_denoise.color_space.label: Color Space
param.chroma_denoise.color_space.short_h: Allowed values: ycbcr_linear, opponent_linear. Default: ycbcr_linear.
param.chroma_denoise.enabled.label: Enabled
param.chroma_denoise.protect_luma.label: Protect Luma
param.data.bayer_pattern.short_help: Bayer matrix pattern for color filter arrays. NONE for monochrome data.
param.data.color_mode.label: Color Mode
param.data.color_mode.short_help: Expected camera color mode. Allowed values: OSC, MONO, RGB.
param.data.image_height.label: Image Height
param.data.image_height.short_help: Optional expected image height in pixels. Range: >= 0.
param.data.image_width.label: Image Width
param.data.image_width.short_help: Optional expected image width in pixels. Range: >= 0.
param.data.linear_required.label: Linear Required
param.data.linear_required.short_help: Require linear (unstretched) input data. Default: true. Deprecated; keep only for backward compatibility.
param.debayer.label: Debayer
param.debayer.short_help: Debayer final CFA stack (OSC). For MONO data, this phase is skipped. Default: true.
param.dithering.enabled.label: Enabled
param.dithering.enabled.short_help: Mark session as dithered. Enables dither diagnostics (detected_count/fraction) in global_registration.json. Default: true.
param.dithering.min_shift_px.label: Min Shift PX
param.dithering.min_shift_px.short_help: Minimum shift in pixels to count a frame as dithered. Range: >= 0. Default: 0.7.
param.global_metrics.adaptive_weights.sh: Auto-adjust global metric weights by variance. Default: true.
param.global_metrics.clamp.label: Clamp
param.global_metrics.clamp.short_help: Clamp range before exponential weighting. Default: [-3, 3].
param.global_metrics.weight_exponent_sca: Exponential scaling factor for global weight separation. Range: > 0. Default: 1.2.
Weight for background penalty term. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.4.
param.global_metrics.weights.gradient.sh: Weight for structure/sharpness term. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.25.
param.global_metrics.weights.noise.label: Noise
param.global_metrics.weights.noise.short: Weight for noise penalty term. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.35.
param.input.pattern.label: Pattern
param.input.sort.short_help: Allowed values: numeric, lexicographic. Default: numeric.
param.linearity.enabled.label: Enabled
param.linearity.max_frames.label: Max Frames
param.linearity.max_frames.short_help: Number of frames used for linearity diagnostics. Range: >= 1. Default: 8.
param.linearity.min_overall_linearity.sh: Minimum acceptable global linearity score. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.9.
param.linearity.strictness.label: Strictness
param.linearity.strictness.short_help: Controls whether linearity violations fail, warn, or are ignored. Allowed values: strict, moderate, permissive. Default: moderate.
param.local_metrics.clamp.label: Clamp
param.local_metrics.clamp.short_help: Clamp range before local exponential weighting. Default: [-3, 3].
param.local_metrics.star_mode.weights.co: Weight of contrast in STAR-tile local quality. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.2.
param.local_metrics.star_mode.weights.fw: Weight of FWHM in STAR-tile local quality. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.6.
param.local_metrics.star_mode.weights.ro: Weight of roundness in STAR-tile local quality. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.2.
param.local_metrics.structure_mode.backg: Weight of background penalty in STRUCTURE-tile mode. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.3.
param.local_metrics.structure_mode.metri: Weight of structure metric in STRUCTURE-tile mode. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.7.
param.log_level.label: Log Level
param.log_level.short_help: Allowed values: trace, debug, info, warn, error. Default: info.
param.normalization.enabled.label: Enabled
param.normalization.mode.label: Mode
param.normalization.mode.short_help: Normalization method. background: robust background matching (recommended). none: disabled (not recommended for production). Allowed values: background, median. Default: background.
param.normalization.per_channel.label: Per Channel
param.normalization.per_channel.short_he: Normalize channels independently for OSC/RGB data. Default: true.
param.output.crop_to_nonzero_bbox.label: Crop To Nonzero Bbox
param.output.crop_to_nonzero_bbox.short_: Crop final stack to bounding box of all non-zero pixels. true: Removes empty borders from final image. Only pixels with values > 0 are kept. Reduces file size and removes unnecessary black borders. false: Keeps full canvas size, including empty borders. Applied after stacking phase but before debayer (for OSC). Tile offsets are adjusted accordingly. Default: true.
param.output.registered_dir.label: Registered Dir
param.output.registered_dir.short_help: Subdirectory for registered frames (under runs/<run_id>/outputs/). Default: registered.
param.output.write_registered_frames.sho: Persist registered frames as FITS (reg_XXXXX.fit). Default: true.
param.pcc.annulus_inner_fwhm_mult.label: Annulus Inner FWHM Mult
param.pcc.annulus_inner_fwhm_mult.short_: Conservative FWHM-adaptive radius controls (v3.3.6 §6.4.2). Range: > 0. Default: 3.
param.pcc.annulus_inner_px.label: Annulus Inner PX
param.pcc.annulus_inner_px.short_help: Aperture/annulus geometry for star photometry. Range: > 0. Default: 10.
param.pcc.annulus_outer_fwhm_mult.label: Annulus Outer FWHM Mult
param.pcc.annulus_outer_fwhm_mult.short_: Conservative FWHM-adaptive radius controls (v3.3.6 §6.4.2). Range: > 0. Default: 5.
param.pcc.annulus_outer_px.label: Annulus Outer PX
param.pcc.annulus_outer_px.short_help: Aperture/annulus geometry for star photometry. Range: > 0. Default: 16.
param.pcc.aperture_fwhm_mult.label: Aperture FWHM Mult
param.pcc.aperture_fwhm_mult.short_help: Conservative FWHM-adaptive radius controls (v3.3.6 §6.4.2). Range: > 0. Default: 1.8.
param.pcc.aperture_radius_px.label: Aperture Radius PX
param.pcc.aperture_radius_px.short_help: Aperture/annulus geometry for star photometry. Range: > 0. Default: 8.
param.pcc.apply_attenuation.label: Apply Attenuation
param.pcc.apply_attenuation.short_help: Enables adaptive attenuation during PCC matrix application (helps in deep shadows/highlights). Default: false.
param.pcc.background_model.label: Background Model
param.pcc.background_model.short_help: Local sky-annulus background model for stellar photometry (plane recommended under gradients, fallback to median if plane fit fails). Allowed values: median, plane. Default: plane.
param.pcc.chroma_strength.label: Chroma Strength
param.pcc.chroma_strength.short_help: Global strength factor for PCC chroma correction during apply. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.85.
param.pcc.enabled.label: Enabled
param.pcc.enabled.short_help: Enable/disable photometric color calibration. Default: true.
param.pcc.mag_bright_limit.label: Mag Bright Limit
param.pcc.mag_bright_limit.short_help: Bright-star upper magnitude cutoff. Range: >= 0, <= 15. Default: 6.
param.pcc.mag_limit.label: Mag Limit
param.pcc.max_condition_number.label: Max Condition Number
param.pcc.max_condition_number.short_hel: Upper bound for PCC matrix condition number; rejects numerically unstable solutions. Range: >= 1. Default: 3.
param.pcc.max_residual_rms.label: Max Residual RMS
param.pcc.max_residual_rms.short_help: Upper bound for robust fit residual RMS; rejects noisy/unstable PCC fits. Range: > 0. Default: 0.7.
param.pcc.min_aperture_px.label: Min Aperture PX
param.pcc.min_aperture_px.short_help: Conservative FWHM-adaptive radius controls (v3.3.6 §6.4.2). Range: > 0. Default: 4.
param.pcc.min_stars.label: Min Stars
param.pcc.min_stars.short_help: Minimum number of valid stars required for PCC. Range: >= 3. Default: 10.
param.pcc.radii_mode.label: Radii Mode
param.pcc.radii_mode.short_help: Radius handling mode. auto_fwhm derives aperture/annulus radii from seeing FWHM using the multipliers below. Allowed values: fixed, auto_fwhm. Default: auto_fwhm.
param.pcc.sigma_clip.short_help: Outlier rejection threshold in PCC fitting. Range: > 0. Default: 2.5.
param.pcc.siril_catalog_dir.label: Siril Catalog Dir
param.pcc.siril_catalog_dir.short_help: Optional local Siril catalog path. Default: .
param.pcc.source.short_help: Source catalog/provider for PCC. Allowed values: auto, siril, vizier_gaia, vizier_apass. Default: siril.
param.pipeline.abort_on_fail.label: Abort On Fail
param.pipeline.abort_on_fail.short_help: Stop immediately when a critical phase fails. true: production-safe behavior (recommended). false: continue for diagnostics/debug runs. Default: false.
param.pipeline.mode.label: Mode
param.pipeline.mode.short_help: Determines the execution mode of the pipeline. production: Complete processing with all quality checks and phases. test: Reduced processing for testing purposes (may skip some validations). Allowed values: production, test. Default: production.
param.registration.enable_star_pair_fall: Enable/disable the extra Star-Pairs fallback stage between Triangle Stars and Trail Endpoints. Set to false to disable the Star-Pairs stage for a stricter fallback policy. When direct registration i→ref fails, the runner automatically tries:. When fewer than star_topk / 2 stars are detected, a second detection pass with a lower threshold (2.5σ instead of 3.5σ) is automatically performed. Default: false.
param.registration.engine.short_help: Primary registration engine. The runner always runs a 6-stage fallback cascade; this key selects the preferred first stage. Allowed values: triangle_star_matching, star_similarity, hybrid_phase_ecc, robust_phase_ecc. Default: triangle_star_matching.
param.registration.reject_cc_mad_multipl: MAD-based robustness for CC outlier threshold. Range: > 0. Default: 4.
param.registration.reject_cc_min_abs.sho: Absolute minimum correlation coefficient threshold. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.3.
param.registration.reject_outliers.label: Reject Outliers
param.registration.reject_outliers.short: Enable robust post-checks for implausible global warps. Default: true.
param.registration.reject_scale_max.shor: Allowed similarity scale range. Warps outside [reject_scale_min, reject_scale_max] or with negative determinant (reflection) are rejected. Range: > 0. Default: 1.08.
param.registration.reject_scale_min.shor: Allowed similarity scale range. Warps outside [reject_scale_min, reject_scale_max] or with negative determinant (reflection) are rejected. Range: > 0. Default: 0.92.
param.registration.reject_shift_median_m: Multiplier for robust shift threshold (multiplier * median_shift). Range: > 0. Default: 5.
param.registration.reject_shift_px_min.s: Fixed minimum shift threshold for rejection logic. Range: >= 0. Default: 100.
param.registration.star_dist_bin_px.shor: Distance histogram bin size in star_similarity. Range: > 0. Default: 5.
param.registration.star_inlier_tol_px.sh: Inlier tolerance in pixels for transformed star matches. Range: > 0. Default: 4.
param.registration.star_min_inliers.shor: Minimum inlier matches required for acceptance. Range: >= 2. Default: 4.
param.registration.star_topk.short_help: Number of strongest stars used for star-based matching. Range: >= 3. Default: 150.
param.run_dir.label: Run Dir
param.runtime_limits.allow_emergency_mod: Allow processing very small datasets in emergency mode. Default: true.
param.runtime_limits.hard_abort_hours.sh: Hard upper runtime limit in hours. Range: > 0. Default: 6.
param.runtime_limits.memory_budget.label: Memory Budget
param.runtime_limits.memory_budget.short: Memory cap that can reduce effective worker parallelism (especially for OSC). Range: >= 1. Default: 2048.
param.runtime_limits.parallel_workers.sh: Max worker threads for tile-heavy phases. Range: >= 1. Default: 8.
param.runtime_limits.tile_analysis_max_f: Tile Analysis Max Factor Vs Stack
Warn when tile analysis exceeds this factor vs baseline stack time. Range: > 0. Default: 3.
param.stacking.cluster_quality_weighting: Optional dominance cap: w_k ≤ cap_ratio * median(w_j) (only active when cap_enabled=true). Default: true.
Optional dominance cap: w_k ≤ cap_ratio * median(w_j) (only active when cap_enabled=true). Range: > 0. Default: 20.
Enable cluster-quality weighting (w_k = exp(kappa_cluster * Q_k)) in final combination. Default: false.
Exponent factor for cluster quality influence. Larger values increase separation between good/bad clusters. Range: > 0. Default: 1.
param.stacking.cosmetic_correction.label: Cosmetic Correction
param.stacking.cosmetic_correction.short: Optional cosmetic correction after stacking. Default: true.
param.stacking.cosmetic_correction_sigma: MAD-sigma threshold for stacking.cosmetic_correction. Lower value = more aggressive. Note: In the stacked image, bright object cores can have high local contrast. Too aggressive settings can treat real signal peaks as hot pixels. MONO / calibrated data: 5.0. Range: > 0. Default: 4.
param.stacking.method.label: Method
param.stacking.method.short_help: Final stacking method. Allowed values: rej, average. Default: rej.
param.stacking.output_stretch.label: Output Stretch
param.stacking.output_stretch.short_help: Optional output stretch for preview-style output. Default: false.
param.stacking.per_frame_cosmetic_correc: Hot-pixel correction per frame before PREWARP/stacking. This targets fixed sensor defects (RGB single-pixel speckles) that appear at the same coordinates in every frame and therefore can survive stack sigma clipping. Default: true.
MAD-sigma threshold for stacking.per_frame_cosmetic_correction. Range: > 0. Default: 2.5.
param.stacking.sigma_clip.min_fraction.s: Minimum surviving frame fraction per pixel. Falls back to unclipped mean if violated. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 0.4.
param.stacking.sigma_clip.sigma_high.sho: Lower/upper sigma thresholds for rejection. Pixel rejected when z < -sigma_low or z > sigma_high. Range: > 0. Default: 1.8.
param.stacking.sigma_clip.sigma_low.shor: Lower/upper sigma thresholds for rejection. Pixel rejected when z < -sigma_low or z > sigma_high. Range: > 0. Default: 1.8.
param.synthetic.clustering.mode.label: Mode
param.synthetic.clustering.mode.short_he: Clustering method for synthetic generation. Allowed values: kmeans, quantile. Default: kmeans.
param.synthetic.frames_max.label: Frames Max
param.synthetic.frames_max.short_help: Upper limit for generated synthetic frames. Range: >= 1. Default: 20.
param.synthetic.frames_min.label: Frames Min
param.synthetic.frames_min.short_help: Minimum cluster size required to generate synthetic output. Range: >= 1. Default: 4.
param.synthetic.weighting.label: Weighting
param.synthetic.weighting.short_help: Weighting strategy for synthetic frame creation. Allowed values: global, tile_weighted. Default: tile_weighted.
param.tile.max_divisor.label: Max Divisor
param.tile.max_divisor.short_help: Upper tile size bound via shorter side divisor. Range: >= 1. Default: 6.
param.tile.min_size.label: Min Size
param.tile.min_size.short_help: Minimum tile size in pixels. Range: >= 1. Default: 48.
param.tile.overlap_fraction.label: Overlap Fraction
param.tile.overlap_fraction.short_help: Fractional overlap for overlap-add blending. Range: >= 0, <= 0.5. Default: 0.3.
param.tile.size_factor.label: Size Factor
param.tile.size_factor.short_help: Base tile size factor (T0 = size_factor * FWHM). Range: >= 1. Default: 24.
param.tile.star_min_count.label: Star Min Count
param.tile.star_min_count.short_help: Threshold for STAR vs STRUCTURE tile classification. Range: >= 0. Default: 5.
param.tile_denoise.soft_threshold.blur_k: Blur radius used for local noise estimate. Range: >= 3. Default: 21.
param.tile_denoise.soft_threshold.enable: Enable soft-threshold denoising (default active path). Default: true.
param.tile_denoise.soft_threshold.skip_s: Avoid denoising in STAR tiles to protect stellar detail. Default: true.
param.tile_denoise.wiener.enabled.label: Enabled
param.tile_denoise.wiener.enabled.short_: Optional Wiener denoise branch (off by default). Default: true.
param.tile_denoise.wiener.max_iterations: Maximum iterations for Wiener optimization. Range: >= 1. Default: 10.
param.tile_denoise.wiener.min_snr.label: Min SNR
param.tile_denoise.wiener.min_snr.short_: Minimum SNR for stable Wiener estimation. Range: >= 0. Default: 2.
param.tile_denoise.wiener.q_max.label: Q Max
param.tile_denoise.wiener.q_max.short_he: Quality parameter search range for Wiener optimization. Range: >= 0, <= 1. Default: 1.
param.tile_denoise.wiener.q_min.label: Q Min
param.tile_denoise.wiener.q_min.short_he: Quality parameter search range for Wiener optimization. Range: >= -1. Default: -0.5.
param.tile_denoise.wiener.q_step.label: Q Step
param.tile_denoise.wiener.q_step.short_h: Step size for q-parameter optimization. Range: > 0. Default: 0.1.
SNR threshold; tiles above this are typically not filtered. Range: >= 0. Default: 4.
param.validation.max_background_rms_incr: Maximum allowed background RMS increase in %. Default: 2.
param.validation.min_fwhm_improvement_pe: Required minimum FWHM improvement in %. Default: 3.
param.validation.min_tile_weight_varianc: Minimum local tile-weight variance sanity threshold. Range: >= 0. Default: 0.05.
param.validation.require_no_tile_pattern: Enforce tile-pattern detector check. Default: true.
